blog_title: Screen Print Cracking in Monsoon — Why 300 T-Shirts Failed and the ₹15 Humidity Fix Every Printer Misses
caption:
300 printed tees cracked in one monsoon. Here's why.

Printer cured at 25 sec, 320°F. Humidity hit 80%. Moisture trapped under the ink, heat separated the layers — crack city 😬

Monsoon fix? Add 15–20 extra seconds. Curing time: 40–45 sec instead of 25. Plus a ₹15 moisture absorber packet by the dryer.

Save this post before your next monsoon batch.
